prestazioni: Engine: A20NHT (2.0L Turbo I4) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley H-beam connecting rods (650HP+ capable), Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings. Stock crankshaft retained with balanced assembly by Vibratech TVD.

Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (76mm inducer, 106mm exducer), TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, and custom 3.5" stainless downpipe with Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter. Supporting mods include a PWR Performance intercooler (4.5L core, 600HP+ efficiency) and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines.

ECU & Fueling: Syvecs S8 Plug & Play ECU with flex-fuel capability, paired with a Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump (450LPH), Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (1:1 rising rate). Ignition system upgraded to NGK R7437-11 Iridium IX spark plugs with MSD 8516 coil packs and custom 10mm ignition leads.
estetica: Body Kit: Prior Design PD800R widebody conversion with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts (OEM+ fitment, no cutting required). Front bumper modified for dual 30mm tow hooks and a custom 3D-printed radiator support for improved airflow.

Wheels & Suspension: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 9x20" ET35 (front) and 10.5x20" ET40 (rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear). KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers with adjustable camber plates (front: -3.5°, rear: -2.8°) and polyurethane subframe bushings from SuperPro (P/N: SPF2001K).

Aero & Details: Custom carbon fiber hood with functional NACA ducts (directing air to the intercooler and brake ducts), rear wing from a VW Golf R32 (modified for Insignia OPC mounting points), and a full Respray in Opel’s original ‘Arden Blue’ (Code: 28U) with 3M Matte Clear Coat. Interior stripped with Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, OEM mounting), Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in).
